## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (Helm lint + shellcheck)
- [ ] `make test` passes (helm-unittest)
- [ ] `make template CHART=<name>` renders without errors
- [ ] Chart version bumped in `Chart.yaml` (if chart changed)
- [ ] `values.schema.json` updated (if values changed)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for new or changed templates
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files included
